title: Lizzy 2 x Children's Reusable Plastic Broad Toy Sword/Knight Warrior Toy Sword (62cm) 2 Assorted Colours Fancy dress Costume accessory Kids party Bookweek
features: Includes : 1 x Kids Plastic Toy Sword - The sword is made from Reusable plastic material that is sturdy and durable, ensuring that it will last through many playtimes and adventures.
Measuring 62cm in length, the sword is the perfect size for children to handle and play with. It's not too heavy or cumbersome, making it easy for children to carry and use

This plastic sword is ideal for imaginative play, encouraging children to use their creativity and storytelling skills to come up with exciting adventureso pair with any warrior fancy dress costume, including: a Knight, Roman / Greek Soldier, Ninja, Samurai, Pirate or Fictional Hero!
The sword is also an ideal accessory for fancy dress costumes, completing your child's knight or warrior look and adding to the authenticity of their outfit.
This Children's Plastic Broad Sword makes a great gift idea for any child who loves knights, warriors, or imaginative play. It's sure to be a hit with any little adventurer!
